sentences.en: The concept of health holds different meanings for different people and groups.
sentences.zh: 健康的概念对不同的人和群体有着不同的含义。

grammar.note: hold meanings for... "对……而言具有……意义";两个 different 前后呼应。

sentences.en: These meanings of health have also changed over time.
sentences.zh: 这些健康的含义也随着时间发生了变化。

grammar.note: have changed 现在完成时,表从过去延续到现在的变化;over time "随着时间推移"。

sentences.en: This change is no more evident than in Western society today, when notions of health and health promotion are being challenged and expanded in new ways.
sentences.zh: 这种变化在当今西方社会体现得最为明显——如今健康与健康促进的观念正以新的方式受到挑战和拓展。

grammar.type: no more...than 比较 + when 定语从句
grammar.note: no more evident than in Western society today 直译"没有比在当今西方社会更明显的了",即"最明显";when 引导定语从句修饰 today;are being challenged 现在进行时被动。

sentences.en: For much of recent Western history, health has been viewed in the physical sense only.
sentences.zh: 在西方近代史的大部分时间里,健康仅仅被从身体层面来看待。

grammar.note: has been viewed 现在完成时被动语态,表过去延续至今;in the physical sense "在身体意义上"。

sentences.en: That is, good health has been connected to the smooth mechanical operation of the body, while ill health has been attributed to a breakdown in this machine.
sentences.zh: 也就是说,健康被等同于身体这部机器的顺畅机械运转,而疾病则被归因于这部机器出了故障。

grammar.note: That is "也就是说";be connected to 与 be attributed to 两个现在完成时被动结构前后对照;while 表对比"而"。

sentences.en: Health in this sense has been defined as the absence of disease or illness and is seen in medical terms.
sentences.zh: 这种意义上的健康被定义为"没有疾病",并且是从医学角度来理解的。

grammar.note: has been defined as 与 is seen 两个被动谓语并列;absence of "没有,缺乏";in medical terms "从医学角度"。

sentences.en: According to this view, creating health for people means providing medical care to treat or prevent disease and illness.
sentences.zh: 按照这种观点,为人们创造健康就意味着提供医疗服务来治疗或预防疾病。

grammar.note: creating health 动名词短语作主语;means providing... 动名词短语作宾语;to treat or prevent 不定式表目的。

sentences.en: During this period, there was an emphasis on providing clean water, improved sanitation and housing.
sentences.zh: 在这一时期,重点是提供清洁的用水、更好的卫生设施和住房。

grammar.note: emphasis on doing "对……的强调";providing 后接 clean water、improved sanitation、housing 三个并列宾语。

sentences.en: In the late 1940s the World Health Organisation challenged this physically and medically oriented view of health.
sentences.zh: 20世纪40年代末,世界卫生组织对这种以身体和医学为导向的健康观提出了挑战。

grammar.note: physically and medically oriented 副词+过去分词构成复合前置定语"以身体和医学为导向的";challenge 作动词"质疑,挑战"。

sentences.en: They stated that 'health is a complete state of physical, mental and social well-being and is not merely the absence of disease' (WHO, 1946).
sentences.zh: 他们宣称:"健康是身体、心理和社会福祉的完满状态,而不仅仅是没有疾病"(世界卫生组织,1946)。

grammar.note: that 引导宾语从句,内容为直接引用;从句内 is... and is not... 两个系表结构并列;merely "仅仅"。

sentences.en: Health and the person were seen more holistically (mind/body/spirit) and not just in physical terms.
sentences.zh: 健康与人被更全面地看待(心理/身体/精神),而不只是从身体层面。

grammar.note: were seen 被动语态;holistically 副词"整体地";not just "不只是",与 more holistically 对照。

sentences.en: The 1970s was a time of focusing on the prevention of disease and illness by emphasising the importance of the lifestyle and behaviour of the individual.
sentences.zh: 20世纪70年代是一个通过强调个人生活方式和行为的重要性来关注疾病预防的时代。

grammar.note: of focusing on... 与 by emphasising... 两个"介词+动名词"结构层层嵌套;by 表方式"通过"。

sentences.en: Specific behaviours which were seen to increase risk of disease, such as smoking, lack of fitness and unhealthy eating habits, were targeted.
sentences.zh: 那些被认为会增加疾病风险的特定行为——如吸烟、缺乏锻炼和不健康的饮食习惯——成为了整治目标。

grammar.type: 定语从句 + 插入举例
grammar.note: which were seen to do 定语从句修饰 behaviours;such as... 插入举例;主干为 Specific behaviours were targeted(被动)。

sentences.en: Creating health meant providing not only medical health care, but health promotion programs and policies which would help people maintain healthy behaviours and lifestyles.
sentences.zh: 创造健康不仅意味着提供医疗保健,还包括能帮助人们保持健康行为和生活方式的健康促进项目与政策。

grammar.note: not only A but B 连接 providing 的两个并列宾语;which would help... 定语从句修饰 programs and policies;help sb do 后省 to。

sentences.en: While this individualistic healthy lifestyles approach to health worked for some (the wealthy members of society), people experiencing poverty, unemployment, underemployment or little control over the conditions of their daily lives benefited little from this approach.
sentences.zh: 虽然这种个人主义的健康生活方式路径对一些人(社会中的富裕成员)有效,但那些经历贫困、失业、就业不足或对日常生活条件几乎没有掌控力的人,却几乎没有从中受益。

grammar.type: While 让步从句 + 现在分词定语
grammar.note: While "虽然";experiencing... 现在分词短语作后置定语,修饰 people,内含四个并列宾语;主句谓语 benefited little "几乎没受益"。

sentences.en: This was largely because both the healthy lifestyles approach and the medical approach to health largely ignored the social and environmental conditions affecting the health of people.
sentences.zh: 这主要是因为健康生活方式路径和医学路径都在很大程度上忽视了影响人们健康的社会和环境条件。

grammar.note: This was because... "这是因为",because 从句作表语;both A and B 并列主语;affecting... 现在分词短语作后置定语修饰 conditions。

sentences.en: During the 1980s and 1990s there has been a growing swing away from seeing lifestyle risks as the root cause of poor health.
sentences.zh: 在20世纪八九十年代,人们越来越不再把生活方式风险视为健康不良的根本原因。

grammar.note: there has been a growing swing away from doing "出现了日益远离……的转向";see A as B "把A看作B"。

sentences.en: While lifestyle factors still remain important, health is being viewed also in terms of the social, economic and environmental contexts in which people live.
sentences.zh: 虽然生活方式因素依然重要,但健康也开始被放在人们所处的社会、经济和环境背景中来看待。

grammar.type: While 让步从句 + 介词+which 定语从句
grammar.note: is being viewed 现在进行时被动;in terms of "从……角度";in which people live 定语从句修饰 contexts(介词前置)。

sentences.en: This broad approach to health is called the socio-ecological view of health.
sentences.zh: 这种宽泛的健康观被称为社会生态健康观。

grammar.note: is called + 名词短语作主语补足语;approach to health "对健康的态度/路径",to 是介词。

sentences.en: The broad socio-ecological view of health was endorsed at the first International Conference of Health Promotion held in 1986, Ottawa, Canada, where people from 38 countries agreed and declared that:
sentences.zh: 这种宽泛的社会生态健康观在1986年于加拿大渥太华举行的第一届国际健康促进大会上得到认可;来自38个国家的与会者一致宣告:

grammar.type: 被动 + 过去分词定语 + where 定语从句
grammar.note: was endorsed 被动;held in 1986 过去分词短语作后置定语修饰 Conference;where 引导非限制性定语从句,agreed 与 declared 并列。

sentences.en: The fundamental conditions and resources for health are peace, shelter, education, food, a viable income, a stable eco-system, sustainable resources, social justice and equity.
sentences.zh: 健康的基本条件和资源是:和平、住所、教育、食物、可维持生计的收入、稳定的生态系统、可持续的资源、社会公正与公平。

grammar.note: 九个名词(短语)并列作表语;此句为WHO《渥太华宣言》引文,雅思高频背景句。

sentences.en: Improvement in health requires a secure foundation in these basic requirements. (WHO, 1986)
sentences.zh: 健康的改善需要以这些基本条件为坚实基础。(世界卫生组织,1986)

grammar.note: Improvement in health 名词化主语;secure foundation "坚实的基础";引文的收尾句。

sentences.en: It is clear from this statement that the creation of health is about much more than encouraging healthy individual behaviours and lifestyles and providing appropriate medical care.
sentences.zh: 从这一声明可以清楚地看出,创造健康远不止是鼓励个人的健康行为和生活方式、提供适当的医疗服务。

grammar.type: it 形式主语 + 主语从句
grammar.note: It is clear that...,真正的主语是 that 从句;much more than 后接 encouraging... 与 providing... 两个并列动名词短语。

sentences.en: Therefore, the creation of health must include addressing issues such as poverty, pollution, urbanisation, natural resource depletion, social alienation and poor working conditions.
sentences.zh: 因此,创造健康必须包括解决贫困、污染、城市化、自然资源枯竭、社会疏离和恶劣工作条件等问题。

grammar.note: include addressing... 动名词作宾语;such as 列举六项社会问题;address 此处作动词"解决,处理"。

sentences.en: The social, economic and environmental contexts which contribute to the creation of health do not operate separately or independently of each other.
sentences.zh: 促成健康的社会、经济和环境背景,并不是彼此分离、各自独立运作的。

grammar.note: which contribute to... 定语从句修饰主语 contexts,主干为 The contexts do not operate...;contribute to "促成,有助于"。

sentences.en: Rather, they are interacting and interdependent, and it is the complex interrelationships between them which determine the conditions that promote health.
sentences.zh: 相反,它们相互作用、相互依存;正是它们之间复杂的相互关系,决定了促进健康的各种条件。

grammar.note: it is the complex interrelationships... which determine... 强调句型,强调主语;that promote health 定语从句修饰 conditions;Rather 句首表"相反"。

sentences.en: A broad socio-ecological view of health suggests that the promotion of health must include a strong social, economic and environmental focus.
sentences.zh: 宽泛的社会生态健康观表明,健康促进必须包含对社会、经济和环境的高度关注。

grammar.note: suggests that... 宾语从句;此处 suggest 意为"表明",从句用陈述语气(不用虚拟)。

sentences.en: At the Ottawa Conference in 1986, a charter was developed which outlined new directions for health promotion based on the socio-ecological view of health.
sentences.zh: 在1986年的渥太华大会上制定了一份章程,勾勒出基于社会生态健康观的健康促进新方向。

grammar.type: 被动 + 分隔式定语从句
grammar.note: which outlined... 定语从句修饰 a charter,但被谓语 was developed 分隔(从句后置以避免头重脚轻);based on... 过去分词短语作定语。

sentences.en: This charter, known as the Ottawa Charter for Health Promotion, remains as the backbone of health action today.
sentences.zh: 这份章程被称为《渥太华健康促进宪章》,至今仍是健康行动的支柱。

grammar.note: known as... 过去分词短语作插入性定语;remain as "仍然是"。

sentences.en: In exploring the scope of health promotion it states that:
sentences.zh: 在探讨健康促进的范围时,它指出:

grammar.note: In exploring... "在探讨……的过程中",介词+动名词作状语;states that 引出下文引文。

sentences.en: Good health is a major resource for social, economic and personal development and an important dimension of quality of life.
sentences.zh: 良好的健康是社会、经济和个人发展的重要资源,也是生活质量的一个重要维度。

grammar.note: a major resource... 和 an important dimension... 两个名词短语并列作表语;此句为《渥太华宪章》引文。

sentences.en: Political, economic, social, cultural, environmental, behavioural and biological factors can all favour health or be harmful to it. (WHO, 1986)
sentences.zh: 政治、经济、社会、文化、环境、行为和生物因素,都可能有利于健康,也可能有害于健康。(世界卫生组织,1986)

grammar.type: 情态动词 + 并列谓语
grammar.note: 七个形容词并列修饰 factors;can favour... or be harmful to... 两种可能并列;favour 作动词"有利于"。

sentences.en: The Ottawa Charter brings practical meaning and action to this broad notion of health promotion.
sentences.zh: 《渥太华宪章》为健康促进这一宽泛理念赋予了实际的意义和行动。

grammar.note: bring A to B "把A带给B";practical meaning and action 并列宾语。

sentences.en: It presents fundamental strategies and approaches in achieving health for all.
sentences.zh: 它提出了实现人人健康的基本战略和途径。

grammar.note: in achieving... 介词+动名词表"在……方面";health for all "人人享有健康"(WHO口号)。

sentences.en: The overall philosophy of health promotion which guides these fundamental strategies and approaches is one of 'enabling people to increase control over and to improve their health' (WHO, 1986).
sentences.zh: 指导这些基本战略和途径的健康促进总体理念,就是"使人们能够增强对自身健康的掌控并加以改善"(世界卫生组织,1986)。

grammar.type: 定语从句 + 动名词表语
grammar.note: which guides... 定语从句修饰 philosophy,主干为 The philosophy is one of...;enable sb to do "使……能够";to increase control over 与 to improve 并列,共享宾语 their health。
